title: Advisor recommendation — recruit unknown advisor (template=quality-advisor)
justification: Multiple open signals about git hooks, bash automation, and deployment infrastructure require monitoring for reliability and best practices
perceive: RECOMMENDATION (user approval required): recruit a 'unknown' advisor seeded from the hub 'quality-advisor' template. Justification: Multiple open signals about git hooks, bash automation, and deployment infrastructure require monitoring for reliability and best practices APPROVE by setting execution_mode=auto on this lug; DEFER/REJECT by moving it out of open/. Hub templates: {hub_path}/WAI-Hub/advisor-templates/. Roster: WAI-Spoke/advisors/registry.json. Pattern: WAI-Spoke/advisors/archie/context_prompt.md.
execute: 0. GATE: only proceed if the user approved (execution_mode=auto). Otherwise stop.
2. Read WAI-Spoke/advisors/registry.json. Reuse a fitting 'new'/'stub' advisor_id in department_id=quality, else use a fresh advisor_id (the domain name, e.g. 'unknown').

4. Write WAI-Spoke/advisors/<advisor_id>/context_prompt.md adapting the quality-advisor charter for domain=unknown (advisor_id, domain, mission, responsibilities, escalation-to-Ozi). Pattern: WAI-Spoke/advisors/archie/context_prompt.md.
6. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/registry.json: advisor entry status=stub, department_id=quality, domain=unknown, initialized_from_template=quality-advisor. Preserve other entries.

7. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/schedule-index.json: if advisor_id absent, append {"advisor_id": "<advisor_id>", "run_cadence": "weekly", "event_triggers": [], "last_run_at": null, "next_recommended_run": null}.
8. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/ozi/scan_state.json: set team_coverage.gaps_detected[domain=unknown].proposal_status=provisioned and the matching recommendations_pending entry to provisioned.
verify: WAI-Spoke/advisors/<advisor_id>/context_prompt.md exists with domain=unknown; scan_state.json initialized; registry.json entry status=stub; schedule-index.json has weekly entry; Ozi scan_state gap[domain=unknown].proposal_status == 'provisioned'.
acceptance_criteria: schedule-index.json has weekly entry for advisor
